title: System Health Alert: Persistent health failures detected in workspace
description:
## 📝 Incident Triage Report
Persistent health check failures have been detected by the self-healing daemon.

### Current Failures:
- Cockpit Control Plane is unreachable at 127.0.0.1:8089

### Diagnostic Failure History:
- 2026-07-15T22:16:10-04:00: Cockpit Control Plane is unreachable at 127.0.0.1:8089

### Suggested Resolution Steps:
1. Run '/triage' check command to inspect active process loops.
2. Confirm the LlamaServer coder model server is running and listening on port 8082.
3. Validate Cockpit dashboard processes and WebSocket connections.
